description: David provided speaker-to-name mappings for the Houston SKO Plaud recordings in a prior session (Intuit=Minu, Oxy=Stephen, Live Nation=Mark, McLane=Shalini, Mainsail=Oscar) but Jarvis did not update the speaker tags in Plaud. This is a repeat failure pattern — err-20260402-001 was logged for the same issue on Specialty Capital.
correction: Speaker mappings provided by David must be immediately registered in Plaud via the speaker rename/tag process per skills/plaud-transcripts/SKILL.md. Do not acknowledge and move on — execute the tag.
systemic_fix: Any time David states 'X is Y' in the context of a Plaud recording, treat it as an immediate speaker-tag instruction. Execute via Plaud skill before continuing. Same session, same response.
